_comment: Canonical evaluation metrics — the SINGLE source of truth for the Models & Metrics screen. build_cache reads this; the eval scripts (src/engine1/*, src/engine2/build_predictor.py, build_embeddings.py) write their own section via src.shared.metrics_store.update() when they run. Never hand-edit numbers here to match a screen — re-run the eval instead. Values below are transcribed from reports/*.md (verified 2026-07-16).

lanl.note: 702 real red-team events; Autoencoder shipped; NTLM ablation

predictor.note: Interpolated Markov shipped; 5.4x the kill-chain baseline = anti-circularity
